LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonSuccessDesc: {0} answers the sigil. A hostile breach signature has entered the map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoMap: This sigil can only be used while the pawn is standing on an active map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_EncounterActive: An abyssal encounter is already active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoCircle: No powered abyssal summoning circle is available.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllBusy: All abyssal summoning circles are currently busy.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllUnpowered: All abyssal summoning circles are unpowered.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllBlocked: All abyssal summoning circles are blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoCircleAvailable: No valid abyssal summoning circle is available right now.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoEdge: No valid breach point was found near the map edge.
LanguageData.ABY_SecretBossRevealDesc: The beast died before completing its first phase. The kill did not end the protocol. A greater breach is forming.
LanguageData.ABY_FirstBossKillDesc:
The first major form has fallen. But its death did not interrupt the process. It completed it.
Some structures do not dissolve in silence. They travel upward through the chain. Sometimes what remains is not a corpse, but a rupture-shape too precise to be only a trace.
What seemed like a summit was only the first answer. Not a god. Not even its voice. Only a gesture someone dared to look at.
The old fragments warned: **the first messenger is not slain for salvation, but to confirm that further conversation is possible.**
The worst part is not the silence after. It is the way the silence holds. As if the next step is already waiting.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldIntegrationUnlockedDesc: The fragment analysis path has been opened. Decode a recovered herald core fragment at a hi-tech research bench to unlock Herald weapon and implant research.
LanguageData.ABY_SignalTheoryGuidanceDesc: Research Abyssal Signal Theory to begin the summon loop and unlock the first abyssal infrastructure.
LanguageData.ABY_FirstSigilGuidanceDesc: Forge an archon sigil at the Abyssal Forge, then activate it at a powered abyssal summoning circle to call the first boss.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisCompleteDesc: The recovered fragment has been successfully decoded at a hi-tech research bench. {0} and {1} are now accessible through the Abyssal Protocol research tab.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisAlreadyKnown: Herald fragment analysis is already complete. The fragment was returned.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisFailedMissingProject: Herald fragment analysis could not be resolved because the required research project was missing. The fragment was returned.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoHostileFaction: No hostile abyssal faction could be resolved for this summon.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoBossArrival: No valid abyssal boss arrival point could be found.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NotPlaced: The summoning circle must be placed before it can be used.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_Busy: The summoning circle is already processing another activation.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoPower: The summoning circle is not powered.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_InteractionBlocked: The interaction cell for the summoning circle is blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_FocusBlocked: The ritual focus area is blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilPlacementFailed: The sigil could not find a valid summoning circle.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConsoleSubtitle: Threat-calibrated breach routing. Arm a prepared sigil, validate the circle, then let a colonist perform the invocation sequence.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleTab_Subtitle: Compact ritual status and direct console access.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleTab_Hint: Use the main console for full ritual preview, readiness checks, and automated sigil assignment.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleTab_Footer: The circle remains a hostile endgame trigger. This console improves readability and control; it does not reduce ritual danger.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleCommand_OpenConsoleDesc: Open the full command console for ritual readiness, threat preview, and sigil assignment.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleReducedEffectsDesc: Softens header sweeps, seal rotation, and other animated accents inside the summoning console.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoPortalSpawn: No valid breach point could be opened near the summoning circle.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleUnstableBreachLetterDesc: The circle tears open a smaller hostile breach. Rift imps are spilling onto the map from the unstable portal, and larger colonies can draw a heavier wave.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Unstable_Desc: Consumes one unstable breach sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and tears open a smaller hostile rift that disgorges early abyssal attackers before the first boss tier.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Unstable_Rewards: • Early hostile summoning rehearsal • Smaller breach pressure before the first boss • A cleaner bridge between the circle and the Archon Beast fight
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Unstable_SideEffects: • Spawns a hostile rift imp breach tied to the circle • Still counts as an active abyssal encounter while the breach is live • Lower threat than the Archon Beast, but meant to pressure unprepared colonies
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Archon_Desc: Consumes one prepared archon sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, charges the breach, and calls the first hostile techno-demonic boss encounter.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Archon_Rewards: • First-loop boss progression • Herald-grade follow-up access • Early abyssal loot and boss-side material gating
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Archon_SideEffects: • Opens a hostile breach on the current map • Can only proceed while the circle is powered and clear • Ritual phases intensify visuals, sound, and encounter pressure
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_LegacySigilRetired: Legacy hexgun relay sigils have been retired from active T1 progression.
LanguageData.ABY_LegacySigilMigration_Message: Converted {0} retired hexgun relay sigils into ember hound sigils.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConfirmInvocation: Assign a prepared sigil and order a colonist to begin {0}? This starts a hostile breach sequence.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleAssignStarted: Invocation sequence assigned. A colonist is moving a sigil to the circle.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConsoleFail_NoCircle: No valid summoning circle is available for console control.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConsoleFail_NoSigil: No prepared archon sigil was found on the current map.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConsoleFail_NoSpecificSigil: No prepared {0} was found on the current map.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConsoleFail_NoOperator: No suitable colonist is currently available to carry a sigil to the circle.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConsoleFail_JobStart: The invocation order could not be started.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleTab_SubtitleShort: Compact ritual status and console access.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleTab_FooterShort: Use the full console for ritual preview and sigil assignment.
